Faryan Andrew Afifi, Esq. 310/226-6722 for defendant DARIUSH MEYKADEH opposing party

Argued and the Court set an evidentiary hearing on February 4, 2001 at 1:00 p.m. Both parties to have 45 minutes each in which to present testimony. The Temporary Restraining Order to remain in full force and effect with the following modification:
January 14th, 8:00 a.m. until January 17th noon, the temporary restraining order will be lifted in its entirety. Then, commencing January 24th at 8:00 a.m. until January 31st noon, the temporary restraining order will be lifted in its entirety. Parties are to participate in mediation. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
